word: H239 - אָזַן - ʼâzan - aw-zan' - Give good heed

sections.paragraph:
Original: אזן

Transliteration: 'âzan

Phonetic: aw-zan'

BDB Definition:

  1. (Piel) weigh, test, prove, consider

Origin: a primitive root [rather identical with H238 through the idea of scales as if two ears]

TWOT entry: 58

Part(s) of speech: Verb
